R

random - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
 
random - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy
 
randomCoordinate() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
 
RandomFleetPlacer - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Populates a Board with a complete, valid fleet using a random placement algorithm.
RandomFleetPlacer() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
Creates a placer with an internally managed Random source.
RandomFleetPlacer(Random) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
Creates a placer with the given Random source, useful for seeding deterministic tests.
RandomHuntStrategy - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy
Machine shot strategy that combines a pure-random phase with a "hunt & target" phase: Random phase: when there is no active hit being pursued, the strategy picks a random cell that has not been shot at yet. Hunt phase: when the last shot was a CellState.HIT, the strategy enqueues the four orthogonal neighbors of that hit (filtering out out-of-bounds and already-shot cells) and then fires randomly among those candidates.
RandomHuntStrategy() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy
 
randomOrientation() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
 
receiveShot(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
Fires a shot at the given coordinate, updating the cell's state and, if applicable, the affected ship's hit registry.
recolorShip(Group, String) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
recordShot(Shot) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
Appends a shot to the history log.
refreshHoverPreview() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
registerHit(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Ship
Registers a hit on the given coordinate.
registerResult(Coordinate, CellState) - Method in interface com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.IMachineShotStrategy
Notifies the strategy of the outcome of its last shot, so it can update its internal targeting state (e.g.
registerResult(Coordinate, CellState) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy
Updates the hunt queue based on the outcome of the last shot.
reloadFreshGame() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Loads a brand-new game-view.fxml, reusing the current nickname.
removeMarker(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Removes the marker overlay at the given coordinate, if one exists.
removeShip(Ship) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
Removes a previously placed ship from the board: clears every cell it occupied back to water and drops it from the fleet.
removeShipOverlay(Ship) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Removes the sprite overlay for the given ship, if one exists.
removeShipVisualAndModel(Ship) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
renderShip(Ship) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
renderShipSilhouette(BoardGridView, Ship, String) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Draws a ship's visual body on the given board view, using the same placement-origin math PlacementController uses for live placement.
renderShotMarker(Shot) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Paints the appropriate MarkerShapeFactory marker for a shot on whichever board it landed on: the opponent's board for a human shot, the player's own board for a machine shot.
resetCellHighlight(Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
Resets a cell's highlight back to the default water look.
resetPlacement() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController

Entry point for resuming a previously saved match.
revealSunkShip(Ship, Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Replaces a ship's overlay with the sunk/revealed variant.
rootNode - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.ShipTrayView
 
rootPane - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
rowDelta - Variable in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation
 
rowIndex - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate
 
run() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.FleetPlacementThread
Runs RandomFleetPlacer.place(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board) on this background thread and then dispatches the result via Platform.runLater(java.lang.Runnable).
run() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.MachineTurnThread
Sleeps for MachineTurnThread.THINK_DELAY_MS, then acquires the session monitor, fires the machine's shot, updates the model, and releases the monitor before dispatching the UI update.
